reviews.review_description: Looking forward to test the full capacity of this one. Very helpful tool! The manual could indeed be clearer, but I feel confident that the developers will take care of that soon.
Supports all current movie standards, including ambisonic and aubtitles!

reviews.review_title: can't put videos in the library
reviews.review_description: no way to put videos in the library

developer_response.body: Works well for all clients, this case guided on e-mail, answering all inquiries within 24 hours at hello@showtimevr.eu.
